prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, here it is:

You've been circling this thing all morning, and you know what? That ends now. The dread you're feeling is always bigger than the task itself — once you're ten minutes in, the monster shrinks.

You don't have to do it perfectly. You don't have to do it all at once. You just have to start. Open the thing. Type the first sentence. Make the first move. Momentum is a liar's cure — it works even when you don't believe in it.

Future You is going to be so relieved. Go make their day.

Now close this tab and go. 🚀
